caption: A video tour moves through a residence, beginning in a bedroom and progressing into an attached bathroom. The initial view shows a room with pale yellow walls, a white crib, and a large wooden built-in wardrobe with silver handles. The camera pans past the wardrobe, moving through a doorway into a bright bathroom. The bathroom features white tiled walls and floors, a glass-enclosed shower stall, and a built-in bathtub. A white vessel sink sits atop a wooden vanity. A window with horizontal blinds allows natural light to fill the space. As the camera advances, it provides a closer look at the shower's glass partition and the adjacent bathtub area, ending with a focused view of the sink and the window. No people are present in the scene.
